description_long: This object is a classic submachine gun with a robust black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture including a fixed stock and a foregrip. The stock and foregrip are crafted from a medium-brown wood, featuring ergonomic contours for comfortable handling. The barrel is cylindrical and ribbed, extending from the receiver with a simple muzzle. A prominent drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity ammunition feed. The top of the receiver is fitted with a rail, and basic iron sights are visible for aiming. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century military firearms, combining utilitarian metalwork with traditional wood elements.
description: A classic submachine gun with a black metal body, ribbed barrel, wooden stock and foregrip, and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, foregrip, ribbed barrel, and drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the alignment of the barrel and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with the wooden stock and foregrip visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wooden stock and the top of the drum magazine.
attribute_stock_design: fixed wooden stock with ergonomic contour
